name: Structured Workflow
description: Task-list driven workflow with structured decomposition, decision policies (auto/deliberate/confirm/notify), permission modes (bypass/allow-after-first/confirm-each), and forced continuation. Built on TaskFlow for durability across restarts.

deliberateMaxRounds.description: Maximum discussion rounds for deliberate tasks

forceContinuation.description: Force continuation when incomplete tasks remain

cancelKeywords.description: Keywords that always override forced continuation

flowDetectionMode.description: How to detect if a message needs task decomposition

activationKeywords.description: Keywords that force task decomposition (when flowDetectionMode is keyword-only)
